caption: A presentation video focuses on affordable housing finance for Massachusetts Communities. In the top-left frame, a slide titled "Learn about affordable housing finance" displays a "HOUSING TOOLBOX" logo and suggests that users "Engage a developer" by inviting one to walk through a "real development pro forma." The top-right frame transitions to a "planning framework" under the heading "What do you want to accomplish?" which lists "GOALS," "STRATEGIES," and "TASKS" alongside simple black icons. Moving to the bottom-left, the slide provides an "Example of (measurable) goals," listing targets such as creating "100 units of low/moderate income rental and homeownership housing units over the next five years" and raising "$1 million annually from 2022 – 2027 for a total of $5M." Finally, the bottom-right frame discusses "Determining how the trust will function," showing a document titled "BEVERLY AFFORDABLE HOUSING TRUST" and a list of "Common elements of guidelines." A small video inset of a man in a blue shirt appears in the upper right of each frame.
